fr_add_body: reply with the item to add to {list_name}:
fr_remove_body: reply with the position number to remove from {list_name}:
fr_edit_body: reply with <pos> <text> to edit, or rename <name> to rename {list_name}:
fr_invite_body: your chat ID is `{chat_id}` — reply with the chat ID to invite to {list_name}:
fr_remove_guest_body: reply with the chat ID to remove from {list_name}:
fr_transfer_body: reply with the new owner's chat ID for {list_name}:
fr_new_list_body: reply with the name for the new list:
err_not_a_number: ⚠️ Please reply with a position number.
err_cannot_delete: ⚠️ Cannot delete: list is not empty.
err_invite_failed: ⚠️ Could not invite `{chat_id}` (already shared or list not found).
err_remove_guest_failed: ⚠️ Chat `{chat_id}` was not in the share list.
err_transfer_failed: ⚠️ Could not transfer to `{chat_id}` (not a guest or list not found).
err_no_default: No default list set. Open /lb, pick a list, and tap ⭐ Default.
confirm_list_created: ✅ List created! Tap ➕ Add to start filling it.
confirm_transfer_ok: 🔁 Ownership of *{list_name}* transferred to `{new_owner}`. You are now a guest.
help_text: ListBot — Help Commands /lb — Open the interactive list panel /draw — Draw a random item from your default list /add <text> — Add an item to your default list /cancel — Cancel a pending add/edit/remove prompt /help — Show this message Panel actions 🎲 Draw — Pick a random item ➕ Add — Add an item 🗑 Remove — Remove an item by position ✏️ Edit — Edit an item or rename the list 📋 View — Browse all items 📊 Stats — Draw counts and contributor breakdown ⭐ Default — Set as the default list for /draw and /add 👥 Share — Invite another chat to access this list Sharing To share a list with another chat, go to 👥 Share → ➕ Invite and enter their chat ID. They need to share their ID with you — they can find it here or in their own /help. This chat's ID: {chat_id}
